results.title: HeyMax Launches HeyMax First -- the World's First Miles-Upfront Membership That Let Travellers Fly Now and Earn Later
results.description: Members receive up to one million miles upfront to book their dream flight today, then earn the miles back at their own pace — no deadline, no penalties. All first-year membership fees are waived at launch. SINGAPORE, July 6, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- HeyMax, the Singapore-born AI-powered...
